title: GTBIF Stock Earnings: Green Thumb Industries Beats EPS for Q1 2024
text: Green Thumb Industries surpassed analyst expectations in its first quarter 2024 earnings report. The company delivered earnings per share of 13 cents, significantly outperforming the projected estimate of 4 cents. Revenue totaled $275.81 million, exceeding forecasts by approximately 2.77% compared to the anticipated $268.38 million. Both metrics demonstrated stronger-than-expected operational performance. Net Income reached $31 million, or $0.13 per basic and diluted share. Cash Flow from Operations exceeded $80 million. Adjusted EBITDA surpassed $90 million. Gross Margin stood at $145 million or 52.5% of revenue, an improvement from the previous year. The substantial EPS beat—more than triple the analyst projection—indicates notably robust profitability relative to expectations, while the revenue outperformance suggests solid business momentum.
